title: Task group nursery should not be used for a single start call
description: Task group nursery should not be used with a single start call. It should be used in a loop to start multiple asynchronous tasks.
message: Uses task group nursery with a single start call
recommendation: Use task group nursery in a loop to start multiple asynchronous tasks

noncompliant.code:
async def my_function():
    async with TaskGroup() as tg:
        tg.start_soon(my_task)  # Noncompliant
noncompliant.description: Task group nursery used with a single start call

compliant.code:
async def my_function():
    async with TaskGroup() as tg:
        for _ in range(10):
            tg.start_soon(my_task)
compliant.description: Task group nursery used in a loop, starting multiple tasks

why_is_this_an_issue: Using task group nursery with a single start call can lead to inefficient use of resources, as the task will not be executed until all other tasks in the same event loop have completed.
how_to_fix: Use task group nursery in a loop to start multiple asynchronous tasks
